But, over time, stocks of companies that have delivered numbers or have some corporate development have a higher probability of inching higher as the market moves into stock-specific mode. Our selected stocks for today depict a strong upward trajectory in their overall average score which is based on five key pillars: Earnings, fundamentals, relative valuation, risk, and price momentum. This implies that there has been a significant improvement in their market outlook in the given time frame.

title: Sebi proposes intraday option strike additions to help traders navigate volatility
summary: The market regulator aims to standardize strike management across exchanges, ensuring that traders aren't left without relevant contracts when prices swing sharply during the day.

title: Ajmera Realty share price zooms 10% after Q4 results 2026
summary: Ajmera Realty &amp; Infra India reported a 9.6% gain on May 25 after strong FY26 financial results, with revenue surging 46% to  ₹1,098 crore. Collections and net profit also rose significantly, leading to an ambitious FY27 pre-sales target of  ₹2,200 crore.

title: Harikanta Overseas IPO Day 4: Issue booked over 50% so far. Check GMP and other details about this SME offer
summary: Harikanta Overseas IPO worth  ₹24.30 crore is entirely a fresh issue of 0.27 crore shares, priced in the range of  ₹86 to  ₹91 apiece. Since the SME IPO has no offer-for-sale (OFS) component, all proceeds will be received by the company.

title: Suzlon Energy Q4 results 2026: Consolidated profit falls 6% YoY to  ₹1,114 crore
summary: Suzlon Energy Q4 results 2026: Consolidated profit declined 6% YoY to  ₹1,114 crore, while revenue from operations for the March quarter jumped 45% YoY to  ₹5,468.06 crore. EBITDA at  ₹964 crore jumped 39% YoY.

title: Nifty Metal's 18% YTD rally adds  ₹1.6 lakh crore to investor wealth. Time to be euphoric or cautious?
summary: Nifty Metal is the leading sectoral performer on NSE following a 18% rally, adding  ₹1,60,503 crore to investor wealth. At the same time, the Nifty 50 index has slumped by over 8%.

title: Top Gainers & Losers on May 25: HFCL, Adani Power, Eicher Motors, OLA, Tata Motors, HPCL among top gainers
summary: Indian markets ended May 25 with strong gains, as Nifty 50 rose 1.4% and BSE Sensex climbed 1.42%, driven by falling oil prices and optimism for a US-Iran peace deal. Broader indices also showed positive trends amidst improved risk sentiment.

title: Yaashvi Jewellers IPO Day 1: Issue sees tepid demand, booked only 2% so far. Check price band, offer size, key details
summary: Yaashvi Jewellers IPO runs from May 25 to May 27, priced at  ₹83 per share. The company aims to raise  ₹44 crore for working capital and debt repayment. Currently, the IPO subscription status is 2%, with the retail portion at 4% and NII at 1%.

title: Hindalco investors bank on silver linings beyond March quarter, but valuations are demanding
summary: Hindalco's Q4FY26 net profit halved due to exceptional charges, but surging aluminium and copper prices, Novelis' Oswego plant restart, and upward earnings revisions by brokerages keep the medium-term outlook intact.&nbsp;

title: Nifty 50 breaks above 24,000? Here are the next key levels to watch
summary: According to market experts, the 24,000 level remains a critical hurdle for the Nifty 50 as it coincides with the 52-day exponential moving average (DEMA). Sustaining above this zone will be essential for the continuation of upward momentum.

title: Big push for Hyderabad Metro! IRFC signs  ₹13,527 crore refinancing deal
summary: IRFC shares rose 4% to  ₹102 after securing a  ₹13,527 crore loan from L&amp;TMRHL to refinance Hyderabad Metro Rail project debts. The refinancing enhances financial sustainability and supports the expansion of Hyderabad’s metro network, which currently serves over 500,000 passengers daily.

title: SIP boom a bane for Indian stock market: Is retail money giving FPIs a smooth exit and hurting rupee?
summary: There is a debate that a surge in retail investments through SIPs has provided foreign portfolio investors a smooth exit from Indian equities, leading to significant currency pressures.&nbsp;

title: Penny stock under  ₹10 Shah Metacorp jumps after declaration of  ₹49.8 crore rights issue
summary: Shah Metacorp share price rose over 6% after announcing a rights issue to raise  ₹49.80 crore for expansion. The issue opens on 11 June, offering shares at  ₹4.86 each to enhance shareholder stakes. The company also plans to acquire a 26% interest in renewable energy.

title: NBCC Q4 Results: Navratna PSU posts 39% YoY profit growth to  ₹256 crore; dividend of  ₹0.46 announced
summary: NBCC's Q4FY26 profit came in at  ₹253.51 crore compared with  ₹182.66 crore in the same period last year, recording a growth of 38.78%.

title: The 90% vulnerability: Inside Ajoy Chawla’s masterplan to rewire Titan
summary: A stellar quarter and  ₹76,000 crore in annual revenue couldn’t save Titan from a brutal market crash. As gold tariffs rise and macro shocks hit Tanishq, can the retail giant successfully pivot to a diversified lifestyle future?

title: Schroders Capital plans to build on $1 bn India investment as scope for early investor exits grows beyond IPOs
summary: The company is scouting for opportunities in sectors including consumer, healthcare, technology and artificial intelligence.

summary: Indians sending money abroad for various purposes must comply with new income tax forms 145 and 146, replacing Forms 15CA and 15CB. Details here.

title: Top 5 silver ETFs by lowest tracking error that closely mirror silver prices
summary: Tracking error is one of the most important factors to check while choosing a silver ETF. It shows how closely an ETF follows the actual movement of silver prices. A lower tracking error means the ETF is doing a better job in mirroring silver prices.

title: I asked ChatGPT after petrol price hike, which is cheaper for daily Delhi-Gurugram commute — cab or own car?
summary: As petrol and diesel prices have risen by  ₹8 per litre in the last ten days — crossing the  ₹100 per litre mark in Delhi — I asked ChatGPT, which would be a more affordable means to commute daily from Delhi to Gurugram.&nbsp;

summary: The job market is changing; AI is prompting me to adapt by enhancing my skills and expanding my network. Check how ChatGPT helped me improve my job search.

title: 8th Pay Commission updates: Delay in wage revision could increase govt's fiscal costs, says expert
summary: Momentum around the 8th Pay Commission builds as consultations expand across states, with growing focus on salary revision, pensions, HRA and fiscal planning for government employees.

title: DA, DR hike: Difference between dearness allowance and dearness relief, explained
summary: Dearness allowance (DA) and dearness relief (DR) are salary components for central government employees and pensioners, revised biannually based on inflation — both aimed at offsetting cost-of-living increases.

title: Paytm’s ‘Pocket Money’ feature allows teenagers to pay without bank account
summary: The 'Pocket Money' feature from Paytm enables teenagers to use UPI payments while parents maintain control over spending. With limits on transactions and monthly spending, it fosters responsible money management and provides real-time visibility into a teen's spending patterns via the Paytm app.

title: NPS vs NPS Sanchay: Key differences between the two retirement schemes explained
summary: The National Pension System (NPS) is a popular retirement scheme in India. PFRDA introduced NPS Sanchay for informal sector workers, differing from regular NPS in eligibility and structure.

title: Inside  ₹20-crore SME scam: Sebi bans 7 finfluencers — what investors should know before chasing online tips
summary: Sebi has uncovered a stock manipulation scam involving unregistered finfluencers who misled retail investors via social media, earning over  ₹20 crore in illegal profits. The case highlights rising risks of social media stock fraud and the need for stronger investor awareness.

title: The hidden cost of carrying your home loan
summary: Equity investing will continue to create wealth into the future. But when the spread between borrowing costs and expected returns narrows, balance sheet strength is just as important as portfolio returns, if not more.

title: Adani Enterprises among 6 stocks hit 52-week highs, rally up to 25% in a month
These large-caps have ‘strong buy’ & ‘buy’ recos and an upside potential of up to 27%
summary: Retail market investors are presented with a choice. Act now, when the uncertainty quotient is high. Or, wait for things to settle down. In the second case, you may end up buying stocks that are priced 5-10% higher compared to current levels. But the advantage is that your anxiety quotient will be much lower. And that is important, because decisions taken in anxious times can be terrible for the health of your portfolio. Also: As the market makes a serious attempt at a recovery, sticking to some important rules is a must.

title: 'Inflation and unholy mess:' Why Nithin Kamath thinks RBI may not stay soft on interest rates
summary: Nithin Kamath warned that a weak monsoon caused by El Niño and rising global oil prices linked to the Iran conflict could sharply increase inflation in India. He said higher food and fuel costs may force the RBI to raise interest rates, hurting growth and market sentiment.

title: Gainers & Losers: LIC, Max Healthcare among 7 big movers on Monday
summary: ​Domestic equity markets extended gains for a third straight session. LIC, Vodafone Idea, Eicher Motors and Titagarh Rail Systems surged, while JSW Cement and Max Healthcare declined.

title: FPIs criticise govt and RBI as rupee slide and shrinking returns trigger exits
summary: At a conference in Hong Kong last week, several foreign portfolio investors said the rupee’s persistent depreciation was making them reluctant to increase exposure to Indian assets. But the issue runs deeper than just currency weakness, experts told Mint.

title: Gold, silver rates today: MCX gold rises  ₹820 per 10g, silver surges  ₹5,300 per kg on US-Iran peace optimism
summary: Gold and silver prices rose on May 25, driven by hopes for a peace deal in the Iran conflict, a weaker US dollar, and lower crude oil prices, easing inflation worries. MCX gold surged by  ₹821 and silver by  ₹5,399 amid market optimism.

title: RVNL Q4 Results: Net profit drops 59% YoY to  ₹187 crore; revenue rises 4%, final dividend announced
summary: Rail Vikas Nigam Limited reported mixed Q4 FY26 results with revenue growth of 4.2% YoY to  ₹6,695.9 crore, but net profit fell 59% YoY to  ₹187 crore. For FY26, revenue increased slightly, yet net profit declined 32% to  ₹875 crore.

title: Vegorama Punjabi Angithi IPO allotment expected today: Here's how to check status
summary: The Vegorama Punjabi Angithi IPO allotment is expected today, May 25, after receiving nearly 35 times overall subscription. Retail investors will be allotted shares on a proportional basis, with refunds starting May 26. The IPO price was fixed at  ₹77 per share, with a listing date of May 27.

summary: The entrepreneur credited Buffett as one of the biggest influences in his life and stressed the importance of choosing the right role models.

summary: The push for self-reliance in copper aligns with India’s broader industrial strategy, particularly as demand accelerates from energy transition sectors.

summary: The state-backed financier is leveraging its core strength in transportation finance to support urban mobility and help the Telangana government-owned project replace its high-cost debt.

summary: The Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC) is launching two New Jeevan Sathi joint life insurance plans — Single Premium and Limited Premium — in June 2026. Check eligibility, policy features, benefits and more…

summary: RBI’s 2026 recovery rules aim to curb harassment and strengthen borrower protection, with strict action against intimidation by banks and NBFC agents. Recovery agents cannot harass borrowers, while borrowers must also understand and fulfil their financial responsibilities.

summary: Withdrawing from your EPF before five years may incur TDS if the amount is over  ₹50,000. Exemptions exist for those with nil tax liability who can submit Form 121. Details here.&nbsp;

title: 20/4/10 rule explained: How this budgeting formula can prevent car loan stress
summary: Hooked on a shiny car but worried about loan stress? Start with the 20/4/10 rule to protect your finances: 20% down payment, 4-year loan, and total car costs under 10% of your monthly income. Read on to understand the basic concepts before you lock in with a fresh car loan EMI.&nbsp;
